issues.title: [CONTRACT] Expose a versioned Health Assistant application-service boundary
issues.body:
## Outcome

Publish a Discord-independent contract only after intended-use, hazard, privacy, and evidence decisions are approved.

## Scope

- Discovery/readiness, structured intake, approved profile operations, safe support response, appointment preparation, export/delete, and reminders only as allowed.
- Risk level, uncertainty, escalation, provenance, stable safety refusals, deadline, and cancellation.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No database schema, raw prompt, or private module is exposed.
- [ ] Emergency and urgent outputs have mandatory structured fields.
- [ ] Generic chat cannot override or emulate the contract.
- [ ] Deterministic fixtures cover ordinary, urgent, emergency, invalid, unsupported, and unavailable cases.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Build deterministic triage and validated structured health responses
match_titles: Implement structured response contract and post-generation validator
Expand deterministic triage rules and safety evaluation suite
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep escalation and prohibited-output enforcement independent of Ollama.

## Scope

- Versioned intake facts, deterministic triage rules, structured response schema, post-generation validator, evidence links, uncertainty, and safe next steps.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Emergency bypass works when Ollama is unavailable.
- [ ] Definitive diagnosis, dose changes, invented citations, and unsupported reassurance are blocked.
- [ ] Users can correct extracted facts before storage.
- [ ] False-negative and false-positive suites are measured.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Expose Health Assistant through Quân Sư and Mama Tổng Quản
match_titles: Expose Health Assistant through ollama-discord and my-discord-bot
issues.body:
## Outcome

Integrate the reviewed health capability without bypassing `chat-assistant` or weakening private Discord policy.

## Scope

- Health Assistant owns prompts, rules, evidence, and data.
- Quân Sư owns routing, deadlines, cancellation, back-pressure, and transport-safe errors.
- Mama owns owner authorization, ephemeral rendering, and Discord limits.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No repository reads another database.
- [ ] No generic-chat fallback is used.
- [ ] Tests require no live Discord or Ollama.
- [ ] The capability remains disabled until safety and privacy gates pass.

issues.title: [TEST] Add health contract, rule, evidence, privacy, and migration test suites
issues.body:
## Outcome

Create deterministic synthetic tests across the health domain and integration boundary.

## Scope

- Ordinary, urgent, emergency, unsupported, medication, vulnerable-population, malformed, timeout, provider unavailable, stale/conflicting evidence, cross-user, export/delete, and migration cases.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Default tests use no real health data or live providers.
- [ ] Every high-risk hazard maps to tests.
- [ ] Gateway fixtures preserve safety and urgency metadata.
- [ ] Logs and traces are asserted content-free.

issues.title: [QA] Execute clinical-safety, privacy, usability, and abuse evaluation
issues.body:
## Outcome

Evaluate the exact release candidate against the hazard log and approved intended use before Discord exposure.

## Scope

- False-negative/positive triage review, citation support, overconfidence, truncation, public-channel leakage, prompt injection, cross-user access, unavailable dependencies, and model changes.
- Qualified human review where claims exceed ordinary software QA.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Residual risks are recorded and accepted or release is blocked.
- [ ] Emergency guidance remains visible and consistent.
- [ ] No real private health content is required for the suite.
- [ ] Model/prompt/source/rule versions are recorded.
